title: GPT-5 Achieves Human-Level Reasoning on Benchmark Tests
summary: OpenAI's latest model demonstrates remarkable performance across multi-step logical reasoning tasks, passing expert-level exams in medicine, law, and engineering simultaneously.

title: Google DeepMind Releases AlphaFold 3 for Drug Discovery
summary: The latest version of AlphaFold can now predict interactions between proteins, DNA, RNA, and small molecules with unprecedented accuracy, dramatically accelerating pharmaceutical research.

title: Anthropic Unveils Constitutional AI 2.0 Framework
summary: Anthropic's updated safety framework introduces dynamic value alignment, allowing Claude models to better navigate ethical gray areas through structured deliberation rather than rigid rules.
